sectionsUnavailable: Calibrated Empower lifestyle-personalization, nutrition, fitness, meal-plan, supplement, symptom, lab, metabolic, and treatment models are unavailable for the local fixture.
Sibling Toolbox Genomics Nourish and Thrive sample rows are included only as observed output-structure evidence and are not local personal results or a direct Empower mock report.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The fixture supplies a derived MCM6/LCT rs4988235 call for lactase-persistence context, but no calibrated Empower nutrition, fitness, lifestyle, supplement, symptom, lab, or metabolic interpretation is supplied.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This row can support a narrow lactose-related marker explanation, but it does not prescribe diet, supplements, workouts, labs, or treatment.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Calibrated Empower score, lifestyle-personalization model, meal-plan model, supplement model, fitness model, symptom context, lab context, metabolic model, and ancestry applicability metadata are unavailable in this fixture.
resultRows.sourceLabel: Genetic testing and nutritional genomics references
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The local report must mark Empower-specific personalization unavailable instead of inferring nutrition, fitness, lifestyle, supplement, lab, metabolic, symptom, diagnosis, treatment, or actionability conclusions.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The public sample opens with a Nourish Nutrition Optimization Plan cover, Sample1 identity, May 2018 date, and a repeated note that only a limited number of preview pages are displayed.
resultRows.description: Use this as observed report identity and preview-boundary structure only; it does not prove full-report section coverage.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the public Nourish sample PDF cover and preview footer; this is observed report structure, not a local nutrition conclusion. Used here only as sibling Toolbox nutrition output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local vitamin, diet, supplement, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.item: Vitamin B12 health information and gene table
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample Vitamin B12 page says people with similar genetic markers may be predisposed to low vitamin B12 levels and shows a gene table with CUBN rs1801222 GG non-variant, TCN1 rs526934 AA non-variant, FUT2 rs602662 GG variant, FUT2 rs601338 GG non-variant, and FUT2 rs1047781 AA non-variant.
resultRows.description: The page includes condition-definition text and CUBN, TCN1, and FUT2 gene definitions.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 13 of the public Nourish sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure and not a local vitamin B12 status, deficiency, diet, lab, or supplement conclusion. Used here only as sibling Toolbox nutrition output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local vitamin, diet, supplement, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample Vitamin B12 action page shows Vitamin B12-rich food, Vitamin B12 lab-range, Methylmalonic Acid lab-range, Vitamin B12 supplement, and pro-tip blocks.
resultRows.description: The sample includes food examples, typical lab ranges, a supplement starting-dose statement, and supplement-form text as observed preview content.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 14 of the public Nourish sample PDF; do not turn sample food, lab, dose, or supplement-form text into local advice. Used here only as sibling Toolbox nutrition output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local vitamin, diet, supplement, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.item: Vitamin D3 health information and gene table
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample Vitamin D3 page says people with similar genetic markers may be predisposed to low vitamin D3 levels and shows a gene table with CYP2R1 rs10741657 AA non-variant, GC rs2282679 TT non-variant, GC rs4588 GG non-variant, and DHCR7 rs12785878 TT variant.
resultRows.description: The page includes condition-definition text and CYP2R1, GC, and DHCR7 gene definitions.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 17 of the public Nourish sample PDF; this is observed sample output structure and not local vitamin D status, sun exposure, lab, supplement, or treatment advice. Used here only as sibling Toolbox nutrition output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local vitamin, diet, supplement, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample Vitamin D3 action page shows Sunlight, Vitamin D supplement, Vitamin D3 (25-OH) lab-range, and Probiotics blocks.
resultRows.description: The sample includes sun-exposure text, a supplement amount, lab-range text, and probiotic text as observed preview content.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 18 of the public Nourish sample PDF; do not turn sample sunlight, supplement, lab, probiotic, or dose text into local advice. Used here only as sibling Toolbox nutrition output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local vitamin, diet, supplement, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample preview says the Health Action Plan is customized from DNA test results plus medical history, family medical history, gender, and ethnic background, and that recommendations are selected for actionability.
resultRows.description: The visible sample pages introduce SNP-based report structure, human-study review criteria, recommendation categories, educational-use limits, and healthcare-provider consultation language.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from pages 2-3 of the public Thrive sample PDF as observed report framing only; this is not local medical-history, lifestyle, diet, exercise, or treatment advice. Used here only as sibling Toolbox lifestyle and weight-management output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local diet, workout, appetite, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.groupTitle: Dietary Factors / Weight Loss and Low Fat Diets
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample trait text says people with similar genetic markers may see greater weight-loss results when following a low-fat diet and that others may not experience weight-loss results on a low-carbohydrate, high-fat diet.
resultRows.description: The sample also describes dietary-fat response context and gene definitions for UCP3, IRS1, and TCF7L2.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 19 of the public Thrive sample PDF as sample trait-page structure only; do not infer local diet or weight-loss response. Used here only as sibling Toolbox lifestyle and weight-management output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local diet, workout, appetite, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.groupTitle: Dietary Factors / Weight Loss and Low Fat Diets
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample cards include reduce dietary fat intake, whole plant-based carbohydrates, increase high-quality protein sources, healthy fat choices, total cholesterol, LDL-C, and triglyceride context.
resultRows.description: The sample cards include examples of diet, lipid-marker, and practitioner-context output blocks in the report.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from pages 21-22 of the public Thrive sample PDF as output-format examples only; do not convert sample diet cards or cholesterol ranges into local advice or lab interpretation. Used here only as sibling Toolbox lifestyle and weight-management output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local diet, workout, appetite, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample trait text says people with similar genetic markers may be predisposed to difficulty regulating food consumption or stopping eating, and describes neurotransmitter and food-preference context.
resultRows.description: The sample page includes MC4R appetite and energy-regulation context and TAS2R38 bitter-taste and food-preference context.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 32 of the public Thrive sample PDF as sample trait-page structure only; do not infer local appetite, taste, stress, or eating-behavior conclusions. Used here only as sibling Toolbox lifestyle and weight-management output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local diet, workout, appetite, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Observed sample cards include locking up or tossing out unhealthy snack-like foods, stress-reduction techniques, increasing omega-3 fatty-acid foods, and fasting leptin context.
resultRows.description: The sample card structure includes behavioral, stress, omega-3 food, and hormone-context output blocks.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 33 of the public Thrive sample PDF as output-format examples only; do not convert sample behavior, omega-3, stress, or leptin text into local advice or lab interpretation. Used here only as sibling Toolbox lifestyle and weight-management output-structure evidence for Empower; this is not a direct Empower sample report and not local diet, workout, appetite, lab, metabolic, diagnosis, or treatment evidence.

missingInputs: Meal-plan, supplement, fitness, symptom, lab, metabolic, ancestry-applicability, and treatment models
Diet history, symptom history, lab values, medications, health goals, and professional review context
uncertainty: No calibrated Empower model is supplied for this local package.
Sibling Toolbox sample rows show output structure only and cannot be treated as the user's personal diet, supplement, workout, lab, metabolic, symptom, diagnosis, treatment, or actionability result.
limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.
The package does not emit complete SNP tables, sequencing files, alignment files, meal plans, supplement plans, workout plans, lab interpretations, or treatment plans.

The package does not diagnose conditions, interpret symptoms or labs, infer metabolic disease, prescribe diets, recommend supplements, create workouts, change medications, or provide treatment guidance.
